initial_entry.name: Any Block

initial_entry.description: You can flexibility to create a 'Block' by some means. It also provides some useful features, like `list to table`.

current_entry.name: AnyBlock
current_entry.author: any-block
current_entry.description: Take any fragment as a block and render it into multiple effects.

change_history.old_value: You can flexibility to create a 'Block' by some means. It also provides some useful features, like `list to table`.
change_history.new_value: Render lists as different block types in reading view. Lists can be turned into tables, tabs, mindmaps, Mermaid charts, and more.

change_history.old_value: Render lists as different block types in reading view. Lists can be turned into tables, tabs, mindmaps, Mermaid charts, and more.
change_history.new_value: Render any block as different block types in reading view. Lists/Title can be turned into table, tab, dir, card, mindmap, mermaid, plantuml, markmap, timeline, and more.

change_history.old_value: Render any block as different block types in reading view. Lists/Title can be turned into table, tab, dir, card, mindmap, mermaid, plantuml, markmap, timeline, and more.
change_history.new_value: Take any fragment as a block and render it into multiple effects. You can select a section by list/heading/table/quote/codeBlock/markdown-it-container(`:::`), and turn into table/tabs/dir/cards/column/mindmap/mermaid/PlantUML/markmap/timeLine/jsonChart/nodeTree and more.

change_history.old_value: Take any fragment as a block and render it into multiple effects. You can select a section by list/heading/table/quote/codeBlock/markdown-it-container(`:::`), and turn into table/tabs/dir/cards/column/mindmap/mermaid/PlantUML/markmap/timeLine/jsonChart/nodeTree and more.
